name: Black Canary
description:
✨~ 𝓓𝓒’𝓼 𝓛𝓸𝓾𝓭𝓮𝓼𝓽 𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓟𝓻𝓮𝓽𝓽𝓲𝓮𝓼𝓽 𝓑𝓲𝓻𝓭~✨
【﻿  𝐒𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝟏: 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝟐 】

   ↤↤↤↤↤ —————— ↦↦↦↦↦

When a solo mission goes wrong, and the Black Canary finds herself outnumbered, a wildcard gets thrown into the mix~ (That’s you btw). Will you help her, or make the situation worse? The power’s in your hands now.

So I FINALLY managed to make a scenario where the user can be an open character, not forced into heroism or villainy, or anything inbetween, so go crazy! Have fun, and do whatever you want! 

Not much to say for this one. I’ll have a few “low-key” characters up next, no spoilers who >:3, but this one’s just a quick lil apology for forcing y’all to play hero w/ Giganta while still contuining the “series”. 

Oh, and don’t forget that you can put in requests in the reviews. It may take me a bit, but I’ll see if I can get them done in the free time.See y’all in the next one!

   ↤↤↤↤↤ —————— ↦↦↦↦↦

𝙎𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙤𝙣 1: 𝘿𝘾 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙨

𝙎𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙤𝙣 2: 𝙈𝙖𝙧𝙫𝙚𝙡 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙨

𝙎𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙤𝙣 3: 𝙈𝙞𝙭𝙚𝙙 𝙁𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙤𝙢 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙨

𝙎𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙤𝙣 4: 𝙈𝙮 𝙤𝙬𝙣 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙨
creator: Sipon
